parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'qc_failed', qc_score: $('Parse & Validate Clusters v3').first().json.qc_score, issues: $('Parse & Validate Clusters v3').first().json.issues, clusters_count: $('Parse & Validate Clusters v3').first().json.clusters_count }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const mlPayload = {
  page_slug: data.clusters?.[0]?.recommended_url || '/',
  main_keyword: data.clusters?.[0]?.main_keyword || data.niche,
  has_faq: data.aeo_coverage > 50,
  has_schema_faq: data.aeo_coverage > 70,
  has_speakable: false,
  has_howto: data.clusters?.some(c => c.page_type === 'informational') || false,
  word_count: data.total_keywords_clustered * 80,
  h2_count: data.clusters_count || 0,
  keyword_in_h1: true,
  has_direct_answer: data.aeo_coverage > 30,
  answer_length: data.clusters?.filter(c => c.aeo_query).reduce((s, c) => s + c.aeo_query.length, 0) || 0,
  commercial_ratio: data.clusters_count > 0 ? data.commercial_clusters / data.clusters_count : 0,
  intent_diversity: Object.keys($('Prepare Intents Batch').first().json.intents_breakdown || {}).filter(k => $('Prepare Intents Batch').first().json.intents_breakdown[k] > 0).length
};
return [{ json: { ...data, ml_payload: mlPayload }}];
